productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Brown Formal Shoes
description: Sleek, stylish and elegant, these formal shoes from U.S. Polo Association will polish your office staples with a subtle touch of class. Your everyday wear gets a facelift with the addition of this pair. Note the mildly upraised heel in durable TPU - fashioned to bend so you can have optimal comfort. Now, we can't think of any reasons why you shouldn't buy this shoe!UpperSmooth leather upper with contrast stitch detailFour hole lace upsPadded innerReinforced overlay at the heelBlunt toe cupUpper adhered to the outsoleOutsoleTPU outsole with an upraised heelPatterned lugs all over for grip on various surfacesShoe careWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
